name: QA 023
description:
PCP QA Test No. 023

Test PMCD's PMDA timeout behaviour

Test PMCD's PMDA timeout behaviour

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py fedora43-container reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 023.out.bad)
54a55
> pmStore(pmcd.control.timeout): No permission to perform requested operation
56c57
<     timeout is now 3 seconds
---
> pmStore(pmcd.control.timeout): No permission to perform requested operation
58,59c59
<     timeout is now 8 seconds
< pmcd.control.timeout old value=8 new value=2
---
> pmcd.control.timeout: new value="2" pmStore: No permission to perform requested operation
65,66c65,66
<     inst [5 or "fake_cisco"] value 8
<     inst [6 or "fake_six"] value 8
---
>     inst [5 or "fake_cisco"] value 0
>     inst [6 or "fake_six"] value 0
130,133d129
< [DATE] pmcd(PID) Warning: pduread: timeout (after 3.000000 sec) on fd=FD
< Cleanup "fake_cisco" agent (dom 5): protocol failure for fd=FD
< [DATE] pmcd(PID) Warning: pduread: timeout (after 8.000000 sec) on fd=FD
< Cleanup "fake_six" agent (dom 6): protocol failure for fd=FD
146,147d141
<     "fake_cisco" agent
<     "fake_six" agent
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
